methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series A → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.0x) to $15M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Housing & Construction (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 1 same-sector peers exist in Housing & Construction, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

private.name: Inversion Space
private.rationale: Same sector (Housing & Construction), same stage (Series A)

private.name: Cobod
private.rationale: Same sector (Housing & Construction), same stage (Series A)

data.narrative:
Material Evolution, founded by Liz Gilligan and Sam Clark, is a Series A-stage company in Housing & Construction that has raised $15M to date. The broader construction-tech comp universe includes three private peers (ICON, Inversion Space, Cobod) and no public comparables, limiting the applicability of traditional peer-median approaches.

The analysis relies on stage-progression methodology, which applies a 2.0x step-up multiplier typical of Series A advancement to the $15M total raised as a valuation proxy. This method yields an implied valuation of $30M. A peer-median approach was not applicable due to insufficient same-stage and adjacent-stage comparables within the Housing & Construction sector—only one narrow peer exists in the space, falling short of the minimum three-company threshold required for reliable median analysis.

The triangulated valuation range is $26M to $34M, with a median point of $30M. This narrow band reflects reliance on a single methodological anchor. Key uncertainties include Material Evolution's growth trajectory relative to the broader construction-tech peer set, unit economics within the residential-build segment, and the company's pathway to revenue defensibility. A broader peer-set analysis or revenue-based metrics would strengthen conviction in this range once additional data materializes.
